raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Winna Sarri bija skaisti/ 
un daudf Augtu/ un Barrtbu 
bija no ta preeksch wiſſem/ tee 
Semmes Swehri atradde ap- 
pakſch winna Pahweni/ tee Put- 
ni appakſch Debbeſim dſihwoja 
as winna Sarreem/ un wiſſa 
Meeta barrojachs no ta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wehl redſejn es mannâ 
Galwas Rahdijumaâ us mannu 
Gultu/ un raugi/ weens Wakt- 
necks/ weens ſivehtajs nonalze 
no Debbeſim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas tauze ſiprt/ un ſaz- 
tja ta: Nozehrteet to Kohku/ 
un apzehrteet winna Sarrus/ 
un nobraukjt winna Lappas/ 
un iſkaifajt winna Augtuſ/ ka 
tee Swehri appakſch winna ais- 
behg/ un tee Putni no winna 
Sarreem noskreem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet to Zelmu ar fatwahn 
Saſnehm pametteet eekſch Sein- 
mes/ bet wiſſch lai ar Warra 
un Dſelfes Binneklem mihtſta 
Sahlê paleek/ ka wiſſch no tahs 
Debbes Raſtas tohp flazzinahts/ 
in winna Dalta lai irr ar teem 
Swehreem pee tahs Semmes 
Sahles.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Winna Sirđs lai tohp 
pahrwehrtita/ ka ta par Zilweka 
Sirđi ne paleek/ un weena Loh- 
pa Sirđs lai winnam tohp doh- 
ta/ kamehr ſeptini Laiki pahr 
winnu beidjachs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Scht Leeta irr eeſſch to
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Waktneekt Padohna' nospree- 
ſta/ un eeſſch to Swehtu Sa- 
runnafchanas nolifta/ ka tee 
Dſihwee atſihſt/ ka tam Wiſſu- 
waldigam Warra irr pahr to 
Zilweku Walſtibahm/ un tahs 
dohd/ kam gribbedams/ un pahr 
tahm eezelt tohs Semmaſus 
ſtarp teem Zilwekeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Scho Sapni efmu es 
Kehninsch Nebukadnezars re- 
dſejs. Tu tad Belsazers iſtah- 
ſti to paſchu/ tadeht ka wiſſee 
Gudree mannas Walſtibas man 
to ne warr iſtahſtiht/ bet tu to 
gann mabkt/ tapehz ka to Sweh- 
tu Deewu Gars eeſſch tewim irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad iſtrulhzinajahs Da- 
nijels/ zittadi Belsazers Wahr- 
da/ pee weenas Stundas/ un 
winna Dohmag darrija winnu 
noskummufchu. Tad atbildēja 
tas Kehninsch/ un ſazzija: Bel- 
sazers/ lai tas Sapnis un wiſ- 
na Iſtahſtichana tew noskumm- 
mufchu ne darra. Belsazers/ 
atbildēja/ un ſazzija: Mans 
Kungs/ tchis Sapnis lai noteck 
taweem Eenaidneefeem/ un wiſ- 
na Iſtahſtichana taweem Pret- 
tineefeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas Kohks/ ko tu eſſi re- 
dſejs tik leelu un refuu effain/ 
un kurra Augſums lihds Deb- 
beſim yneedsahs/ un kas pahr 
wiſſu Semmi redſehſs tappe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kurra Sarri ſkaisti/ 
un kam daudf Augtu bija/ un 
kur Barrtba bija preeksch wiſ- 
ſem/ appakſch ko tee Swehri
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
